name: Georgia HOPE Scholarship
amount: Tuition amount at GA public university; $5,000/year at eligible private GA university

eligibility.citizenship: U.S. citizen or eligible non-citizen; GA resident
eligibility.other_requirements: GA resident; graduate from GA high school with 3.0 HOPE GPA; maintain 3.0 GPA in college to renew; no income limit but no minimum test score for initial HOPE eligibility

stackable_notes: State scholarship; can stack with federal and institutional aid. Generally no displacement risk at GA public colleges.
notes: Renewal requires maintaining 3.0 college GPA — significant attrition after freshman year. Zell Miller Scholarship (higher tier) requires 3.7 HOPE GPA and 1200 SAT/26 ACT for initial eligibility. Both are GA-resident-specific.
